description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a driveway leading to a single-car garage, a paved walkway, and a small landscaped yard with trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and additional greenery, creating a private recreational space. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, giving the house a contemporary and elegant appearance. The property is surrounded by several mature trees, enhancing its suburban residential character.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior combines dark and light finishes, surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, outdoor furniture, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the dark exterior wall, pool area, and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, paved steps, and a small porch area adjacent to the garage, framed by landscaping.
